title: E-commerce Behavioral Analysis
tagline: The same 1,438-person IoB survey read as commercial data — platform behavior, Diwali seasonality, and what actually drives people to buy
summary: A published IoB paper and extended data analysis from the behavioral psychology research track. The pan-India survey of 1,438 consumers had commercial signals in it from the start: platform-specific purchase triggers, Diwali seasonality, demographic spend patterns, and how session depth on social media correlates with purchase intent.
